title: Assistant Store Manager - IKEA India Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - IKEA India Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!
